channel.title: Plugin on Coosis's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Plugin on Coosis's Blog

item.title: First-Time: Minecraft Plugin
item.author: 1159727122@qq.com (Coosis)
item.description: Before Everything Else: A week ago, a friend of mine was planning to set up a minecraft server. I got excited, since I have a spare RaspberryPi 4 with 8 gigs of ram ready to be put to use. But with a 32-bit os, it wasn’t really fit for the job. So I started to use my old laptop. I installed pop!_os, downloaded java 17, and after some research, set up a papermc server.
